meta.title: DEF CON 29 Adversary Village - Shantanu Khandelwal - Red Team Credentials Recon: OLD with a TWIST
meta.description: This talk covers the basics of credentials reconnaissance performed for a red team. Mostly covers the reconnaissance performed on GitHub to search for leaked passwords by developers. The current toolset and the Shiny new GitHub Credentials Stroller which dives into each repository and performs a deep scan.
